nasb.text: For they said to me, ‘Make a god for us who will go before us; for this Moses, the man who brought us up from the land of Egypt, we do not know what has become of him.’

esv.text: For they said to me, ‘Make us gods who shall go before us. As for this Moses, the man who brought us up out of the land of Egypt, we do not know what has become of him.’

cnv.text: 他們對我說：‘給我們做神像，可以在我們前面引路，因為那摩西，就是把我們從埃及地領出來的那個人，我們不知道他遭遇了甚麼事。’

ccb.text: 他们对我说，‘为我们造神明来带领我们吧，因为领我们离开埃及的那个摩西不知怎样了。’
